_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Irish Platinum
project.address: Plot No. GH-02A/2, Sector 10, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh 201306
project.description: Premium G+30 ultra-luxury skyscraper development under active construction on the 130m Noida Extension corridor.
project.long_description: Irish Platinum is an iconic upcoming ultra-luxury residential skyscraper project located in the lowest-density enclave of Sector 10, Greater Noida West. Spread across 4.65 acres, this elite gated community features 4 majestic high-rise towers rising to G+30 floors, accommodating just 566 exclusive residences. Designed for discerning buyers, the project represents a rare combination of modern automated living and spatial privacy, offering expansive 3 BHK and 4 BHK layouts. The property boasts a massive, state-of-the-art 2,700 sq ft residential club, a half-Olympic size swimming pool, and an interactive musical fountain with seating layouts. Each residence is built with smart home automation ducting, double-height entrance lobbies, high-speed Otis elevators, and top-tier specifications including Grohe/Kohler washroom counters and app-based smart video door locks.
marketing_claims: Largest Running Club in Delhi NCR (2700 Sqft)
project.project_risk_flag: Medium: Under construction with expected possession in January 2029.

builder.name: Irish Infrastructure
builder.company_overview: Irish Infrastructure Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneer real estate developer in Noida NCR, recognized for creating high-end, premium-specification spaces. Backed by a strong legacy of successful commercial and residential deliveries (such as Irish Pearls), the builder focuses on delivering ultra-luxury residential skyscrapers with futuristic home automation, zero delay protocols, and transparent RERA escrows.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Premium
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with smart automation
unit_types.description: Premium 3 BHK layout featuring three spacious master-format bedrooms, three designer bathrooms with Kohler fittings, home automation pre-ducted systems, and expansive balconies overlooking the musical interactive fountain.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK Ultra
unit_types.subtitle: Flagship 4 BHK Skyscraper suite
unit_types.description: Ultra luxury 4 BHK configuration presenting palatial double-height family lounges, walk-in dressing alcove, independent utility laundry space, and massive balconies providing 270-degree sky views of Greater Noida West.
whats_included: Laminated wooden floor in Master Suite

assumptions: GST is 5.0% because project is under construction.

payment_plan.notes: Includes customized milestone payment flexibility with zero pre-EMIs.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Irish Platinum establishes the luxury gold standard for Sector 10, Noida Extension through premium low-density vertical designs and smart home automations.
why_buy: Unbeatable Density: Located in the lowest density layout zone of Greater Noida West with only 566 units on 4.65 acres.
Elite specifications: All residences come pre-equipped with high-end Italian flooring, Grohe CP, and smart app-locks.
Massive lifestyle clubhouse and half-Olympic pools make it a full-fledged private enclave.
why_avoid: Under construction: Handovers are scheduled for January 2029, requiring a long holding timeline.
High initial price position limits quick short-term flipping profits.
decision_profile.best_for: UHNIs, HNI upgraders, and corporate leaders seeking uncompromising luxury skyscrapers in Noida Extension.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Affordable budget seekers (under Rs 1.5 Cr) or short-term cash flow investors.

buyerPersonas.headline: Ultra Luxury and Automation
reasons: Pre-fitted Grohe CP, smart home lock systems, and private lobbies.
Low density and stunning central musical fountains.

riskRadar.description: Active construction on early floors; expected delivery 2029.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: High appreciation potential driven by upcoming Sector 10 metro operations.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Elite corporate executive tenant base expected post 2029.
investment_insights.market_desc: Leading premium destination in Noida Extension.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Elite premium units command longer listing negotiations but secure highly solid resales.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate - willing to hold for skyscraper completions
persona_profile.family_stage: Established family or HNI nuclear couples
persona_profile.work_location: Noida central corporate nodes and IT hubs
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for high lifestyle prestige, low density living comfort, and strong smart home safety protocols.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: A spectacular low density luxury development. For buyers looking to invest in Noida Extension's finest vertical skyscraper with premium automation, Irish Platinum is an exceptional asset.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Outstanding. The half-Olympic pools, large-format running clubs, and smart Otis lift infrastructure guarantee a world-class living experience.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: High alpha wealth creation. Buying in early construction phases yields solid capital appreciation as Sector 10's metro and commercial setups mature.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Highly secure. Kids and parents can stroll through thematic Zen gardens completely detached from high-speed expressway traffic.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: A solid defensive asset with premium rental premiums from executives wanting high specification living space.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Defines the absolute benchmark in Sector 10. Top quality wood frames, Italian marble, and app-based video door locks.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: RERA-compliant escrow mitigates delivery risks. The builder has strong capital buffers and no litigation.
walk_away_conditions: Urgent need to move in under 2 years.
negotiation_leverage: Highlight under-construction holding timelines to negotiate promotional car parking packages.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ideal time to book. Secure early-bird booking discounts before primary towers casting initiates floor rises.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Larger running residential club (2700 sqft); premium Mivan construction with higher Otis elevator-to-unit ratios.
competitors.verdict: Choose Irish Platinum for premium specifications, luxury scale, and smart-homes; choose Arihant One for faster move-in.
competitors.price_delta_note: Irish Platinum is slightly premium to Arihant One.
